programmes.show_description: First-ever episode of the much-loved sitcom that launched Smithy onto the scene! After being phone buddies for months, Gavin and Stacey arrange a rendezvous in London.
When the couple have their first lovers' tiff, Gavin is so beside himself with worry that he drives all the way to Barry Island to make amends.
The couple announce their engagement and the families unite for a party in Billericay, but they are unprepared for a bombshell that awaits them.

programmes.show_name: The Gentle Art of Swedish Death Cleaning
programmes.show_description: The Mother Load: The Death Cleaners help Lindsey after her mother and extended family leave everything they don't want at her house - causing her to lose her personal style.
Dame Judi Dench: Louis meets the beloved Oscar-winning actress for a candid and lively conversation about her long career, her passion for theatre, and life away from acting.
Shopping from Home.
Feet of Clay: Part 3: Heaton's suspect provides an alibi for one of the murders, and helps the police by identifying everyone involved in staging the rave events attended by the victims.
One Year On: When a cab driver is badly beaten and robbed, an electronic travel card found near the crime scene provides a lead to a volunteer working on the Jasmine Allen estate.
Bleeding Hearts: Nate falls for a paramedic called to attend to the victim of a fight, but is later forced to arrest her brother for his part in the incident.
Broken Hearts: A stabbing victim proves uncooperative and clearly has something to hide. Nate is furious to learn his new love interest agreed not to report the crime.
Righteous Kill: Part 1: Max's Polish ancestry proves useful when he investigates corruption in Sun Hill's immigrant community.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine.

The fast-paced reality series continues. HART staff must treat one of their own after a freak accident involving a 4x4 leaves an off-duty medic with serious injuries.
One more shift with Yorkshire Ambulance Service's Hazardous Area Response Team. The team are called into action when an explosion demolishes a block of flats.
The response team race to the rescue of a worker trapped in a collapsed trench, and paramedic Kim must risk her own life to give him medical treatment 10ft underground.
A truck driver is trapped in his crushed cab after a motorway smash, while in Hull, firefighters handcuff a man to the rails of the Humber Bridge to stop him from jumping.
Caroline treats a father of four with severe pancreatitis, Rhona restores her patient's health with a large blood transfusion, and Sarah cares for a mum with incurable stomach cancer.
James and Matron Steph have an influx of admissions in the emergency department, Matron Hazera tries to discharge patients to free up beds, and Katie stays late for a high-risk delivery.
First-ever episode of the much-loved sitcom that launched Smithy onto the scene! After being phone buddies for months, Gavin and Stacey arrange a rendezvous in London.
When the couple have their first lovers' tiff, Gavin is so beside himself with worry that he drives all the way to Barry Island to make amends.
The couple announce their engagement and the families unite for a party in Billericay, but they are unprepared for a bombshell that awaits them.
The first ever episode of the hilarious comedy sketch series featuring a gallery of unforgettable characters, from the not-bovvered schoolgirl, to the foul-mouthed granny.
Look at her face, though... is she bovvered? It's the award-winning comedy sketch series with the very versatile actress. Bernie the Irish nurse is feeling a little romantic.
The hilarious comedy sketch series co-written and performed by the very versatile comedy actress. Sketches this time round include Margaret the jumpy woman, plus Paul and Sam.

programmes.show_name: The Gentle Art of Swedish Death Cleaning
programmes.show_description: The Art of a Womon: The Death Cleaners meet Sue, who helped build a lesbian-safe section of Kansas City in the 80s and hasn't been able to tidy up since the love of her life died.
Yungblud: Louis spends time with Dominic Harrison - aka singer and musician Yungblud - as he joins him during his whirlwind tour.
Janine and Adam assist a woman who is threatening to jump out of a first-floor window, and husband and wife team Ann and Kevin are called out to help Ann's sick Dad!
Shopping from Home.
Cards on the Table: Domestic fun with the hapless Harpers. Ben's poker school is costing him a fortune. Susan's visit to a fortune teller suggests something bad is on the cards.
The Wax Job: Popular sitcom about a dentist and his long-suffering family. Ben decides to sell his dental practice and take up a hobby which he finds even more boring!
Neighbour Wars: Frenetic sitcom about a dentist and his family. Having run over Mr Casey's dog some years ago, Ben now compounds the misdemeanour by running over Mr Casey himself.
Can't Get No Satisfaction: The sitcom that does for dentists what Fawlty Towers did for hotel managers! Michael and Alfie's internet dating does not go quite according to plan.
The Abi Habit: Domestic sitcom. According to Susan, abstinence makes the heart grow fonder. While Janey has it thrust upon her, for Abi it may become a longer term commitment.
Bully for Ben: Robert Lindsay stars in the popular sitcom about a dentist and his family. Ben joins the young Harpers for a pub quiz. This leads to some awkward questions being asked.

Tatiana, Peppa & Luna: In a festive special, we meet a crossbreed rescue puppy with severely deformed legs, a Dalmatian with bulging discs in her neck, and a Labrador with painful elbows.
Koa, Kwanda & Cleo: Rescue dog Cleo has struggled with pain in her back leg for years after two failed hip replacement operations, and a puppy from Cornwall is in a huge amount of pain.
Fletcher, Molly & Hedgehog: A lovable Labradoodle visits from Scotland for a revision surgery to fix a bad ankle fracture, while a Carpathian Shepherd has a severely dislocated hip.
Britney, Bella & Skyla: Noel investigates the reasons behind the strange behaviour of an Australian Shepherd, while a Jack Russell puppy comes in with a crushed pelvis.
Ren, Dave & Tallulah: A six-year-old Terrier arrives after being attacked by another dog, while Noel makes a troubling discovery with a French bulldog puppy.

programmes.show_name: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programmes.show_description: In Portsmouth, the paramedics treat a woman who was kicked by a horse and a baby with breathing problems, while in Oxford, crews attend an elderly priest with abdominal pain.

programmes.show_name: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programmes.show_description: Oxford paramedics are called to a woman who sustained a broken leg and horrific facial injuries, while in Portsmouth, a 2-year-old with breathing problems needs a nebuliser.
Today, Mervyn has a procedure to get rid of constant back pain; Gemma has major foot surgery to tighten a painful ligament and 7-year-old Nancy has an operation to straighten a severe squint.
Laura makes a life-changing decision after suffering from post-natal depression and Anne needs an operation to remove a painful bony lump from her foot.
